props.ChoiceText: The bribe was never spoken plainly, which made accepting it feel less like a decision and more like joining a language already in use.
props.ChoiceBio: Quiet corruption taught you how gently office can begin to lean before anyone calls it crooked.

0.TransitionText: Because quiet corruption taught you how gently office can begin to lean before anyone calls it crooked, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A polished fixer still remembers how you first learned the language of favors.
1.TransitionText: Because quiet corruption taught you how gently office can begin to lean before anyone calls it crooked, influence widened beyond civic office into courtly arrangements.
1.TransitionPrompt: This web of favors could draw you into courtly influence, but you may remain a magistrate instead.

1.TargetText: One discreet intermediary still treats you as someone who understands unclean arrangements.
